title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist AI system automates medical discoveries and drug development by identifying treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, vision loss, and other conditions. The system uses self-ranking mechanisms and consensus methods to validate findings against human expert benchmarks.
